content.text:
Based on my analysis of the molecular structure, I can now clearly see atom 7 (N:7) and its covalent bonds.

## Results

**Atom 7 (N)** has the following neighbor atoms:

| Atomic Index | Element |
|-------------|---------|
| 2 | C (Carbon) |
| 6 | C (Carbon) |
| 8 | C (Carbon) |

**geomconf_index**: 9039

The Nitrogen atom (index 7) is covalently bonded to three Carbon atoms (indices 2, 6, and 8), forming part of the ring structure visible in the molecule.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 7, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
